component.name: CourseFin
component.summary: Desktop app for managing and watching offline course content

description.p: CourseFin is a desktop application for managing and watching your offline course library. Organize Udemy courses and other downloaded content, track your progress, and watch videos with built-in playback support.
Features include course library management, video playback with H.264 support, progress tracking, and a clean modern interface built with WebKitGTK.
